The '''Rori Spice Mining Collective''', also known simply as the '''Spice Collective''', was a conglomeration of law-abiding [[Miner/Legends|miners]] who were the only group legally allowed to mine [[Spice/Legends|spice]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo's]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Rori/Legends|Rori]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The miners mostly traded their goods with pharmaceutical companies. By the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], they would often engage in turf wars with their less than honorable [[Kobola Miners|Kobola]] rivals.<ref name="CDHZ" /> They were also in conflict with the extremist [[Rorgungans]] as well as with the [[Narmle Militia]].<ref name="FS">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Faction%20Standings|text=Faction Standings}}</ref> They went by many names and aliases and wore bright green outfits labeled 'Moon Patrol'.
